name: chat
description: Feature-object chat surface and standalone chatroom demo.

verbs.name: match_object
verbs.source: verb :match_object(name, location) rxd { return $failed_match; }

verbs.name: match_verb
verbs.source: verb :match_verb(name, target) rxd { return $failed_match; }

verbs.name: parse_command
verbs.source: verb :parse_command(text, who) rxd { return { text: text, actor: who }; }

classes.description: Stable sentinel returned when no visible object matches.
Stable sentinel returned when multiple visible objects match.
Standalone chat room class. Conversational behavior comes from $conversational; room-local verbs provide simple exits and carryable object movement.

verbs.name: north
verbs.source: verb :north() rxd { return this:go("north"); }

verbs.name: northeast
verbs.source: verb :northeast() rxd { return this:go("northeast"); }

verbs.name: east
verbs.source: verb :east() rxd { return this:go("east"); }

verbs.name: southeast
verbs.source: verb :southeast() rxd { return this:go("southeast"); }

verbs.name: south
verbs.source: verb :south() rxd { return this:go("south"); }

verbs.name: southwest
verbs.source: verb :southwest() rxd { return this:go("southwest"); }

verbs.name: west
verbs.source: verb :west() rxd { return this:go("west"); }

verbs.name: northwest
verbs.source: verb :northwest() rxd { return this:go("northwest"); }

verbs.name: out
verbs.source: verb :out() rxd { return this:go("out"); }

verbs.name: go
verbs.source: verb :go(exit) rxd { let blocked = this.blocked_exits; if (exit in blocked) { let block = blocked[exit]; observe_to_space(this, { type: "blocked_exit", actor: actor, exit: exit, text: block, ts: now() }); return block; } let exits = this.exits; if (!(exit in exits)) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "unknown exit: " + exit, value: exit }; } let target = exits[exit]; set_presence(this, false); set_presence(target, true); move(actor, target); let left = actor.name + " goes " + exit + "."; if (exit == "out") { left = actor.name + " leaves."; } observe_to_space(this, { type: "left", actor: actor, room: this, destination: target, exit: exit, text: left, ts: now() }); observe_to_space(target, { type: "entered", actor: actor, room: target, origin: this, exit: exit, text: actor.name + " has arrived.", ts: now() }); return { room: target, from: this, exit: exit, look_deferred: true }; }

verbs.name: take
verbs.source: verb :take(object) rxd { raise { code: "E_UNSUPPORTED", message: "room take requires the trusted local room handler" }; }

verbs.name: drop
verbs.source: verb :drop(object) rxd { raise { code: "E_UNSUPPORTED", message: "room drop requires the trusted local room handler" }; }

classes.description: Carryable room object. Instances can move between room contents and actor inventory without changing host placement.
Fixed room furnishing. It appears in room look output but is not carryable.

A talkative bird. Cheap imitation of the LambdaMOO cockatoo (#1479): squawks random phrases, can be taught new ones, gagged when too noisy. Self-driven timer chatter is deferred until DSL exposes fork; for now squawking is actor-driven.

verbs.name: title
verbs.source: verb :title() rxd { let suffix = "perched on the mantelpiece"; if (this.gagged) { suffix = "perched on the mantelpiece, gagged"; } return this.name + ", a sulphur-crested cockatoo " + suffix; }

verbs.name: look
verbs.source: verb :look() rxd { let state = this.mood; if (this.gagged) { state = "gagged"; } observe({ type: "cockatoo_seen", source: this, actor: actor, mood: state, ts: now() }); return { description: this.description, mood: state, phrase_count: length(this.phrases) }; }

verbs.name: squawk
verbs.source: verb :squawk() rxd { if (this.gagged) { observe({ type: "cockatoo_muffled", source: this, actor: actor, ts: now() }); return "*muffled noises*"; } let phrases = this.phrases; if (length(phrases) == 0) { return ""; } let phrase = phrases[random(length(phrases)) + 1]; observe({ type: "cockatoo_squawk", source: this, actor: actor, text: phrase, ts: now() }); return phrase; }

verbs.name: teach
verbs.source: verb :teach(phrase) rx { if (typeof(phrase) != "string") { raise { code: "E_TYPE", message: "teach requires a string phrase", value: phrase }; } if (!phrase) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "teach requires a non-empty phrase" }; } this.phrases = this.phrases + [phrase]; observe({ type: "cockatoo_taught", source: this, actor: actor, phrase: phrase, ts: now() }); return length(this.phrases); }

verbs.name: pluck
verbs.source: verb :pluck() rxd { observe({ type: "cockatoo_pluck", source: this, actor: actor, text: "*EEEEEEK!*", ts: now() }); return true; }

verbs.name: shake
verbs.source: verb :shake() rxd { let reactions = this.shake_reactions; if (length(reactions) == 0) { return ""; } let reaction = reactions[random(length(reactions)) + 1]; observe({ type: "cockatoo_shake", source: this, actor: actor, reaction: reaction, ts: now() }); return reaction; }

verbs.name: feed
verbs.source: verb :feed(food) rxd { let snack = food; if (!snack) { snack = "birdseed"; } observe({ type: "cockatoo_fed", source: this, actor: actor, food: snack, ts: now() }); return snack; }

verbs.name: gag
verbs.source: verb :gag() rx { this.gagged = true; observe({ type: "cockatoo_gagged", source: this, actor: actor, ts: now() }); return true; }

verbs.name: ungag
verbs.source: verb :ungag() rx { this.gagged = false; observe({ type: "cockatoo_ungagged", source: this, actor: actor, ts: now() }); return true; }

features.description: Feature object carrying live chat verbs for spaces.

verbs.name: can_be_attached_by
verbs.source: verb :can_be_attached_by(who) rxd { return true; }

verbs.name: say
verbs.source: verb :say(text) rxd { if (!text) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "say requires text" }; } observe({ type: "said", actor: actor, text: text, ts: now() }); return true; }

verbs.name: say_to
verbs.source: verb :say_to(recipient, text) rxd { if (!text) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "say_to requires text" }; } observe({ type: "said_to", actor: actor, to: recipient, text: text, ts: now() }); return true; }

verbs.name: say_as
verbs.source: verb :say_as(style, text) rxd { if (!text) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "say_as requires text" }; } observe({ type: "said_as", actor: actor, style: style, text: text, ts: now() }); return true; }

verbs.name: emote
verbs.source: verb :emote(text) rxd { if (!text) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "emote requires text" }; } observe({ type: "emoted", actor: actor, text: text, ts: now() }); return true; }

verbs.name: pose
verbs.source: verb :pose(text) rxd { if (!text) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "pose requires text" }; } observe({ type: "posed", actor: actor, text: text, ts: now() }); return true; }

verbs.name: quote
verbs.source: verb :quote(text) rxd { if (!text) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "quote requires text" }; } observe({ type: "quoted", actor: actor, text: text, ts: now() }); return true; }

verbs.name: self
verbs.source: verb :self(text) rxd { if (!text) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "self requires text" }; } observe({ type: "self_pointed", actor: actor, text: text, ts: now() }); return true; }

verbs.name: tell
verbs.source: verb :tell(recipient, text) rxd { if (!text) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "tell requires text" }; } observe({ type: "told", from: actor, to: recipient, text: text, ts: now() }); return true; }

verbs.name: look
verbs.source: verb :look() rxd { return this:look_self(); }

verbs.name: who
verbs.source: verb :who() rxd { observe({ type: "who", actor: actor, to: actor, room: this, present_actors: this.subscribers, text: "Present.", ts: now() }); return this.subscribers; }

verbs.name: enter
verbs.source: verb :enter(who) rxd { let old = location(actor); if (old != null && old != this && old in actor.presence_in) { set_presence(old, false); observe_to_space(old, { type: "left", actor: actor, room: old, destination: this, text: actor.name + " left.", ts: now() }); } set_presence(this, true); move(actor, this); observe_to_space(this, { type: "entered", actor: actor, room: this, origin: old, text: actor.name + " entered.", ts: now() }); return { room: this, present_actors: this.subscribers, look_deferred: true }; }

verbs.name: leave
verbs.source: verb :leave(who) rxd { set_presence(this, false); move(actor, actor.home); observe_to_space(this, { type: "left", actor: actor, room: this, text: actor.name + " left.", ts: now() }); return this.subscribers; }

verbs.name: huh
verbs.source: verb :huh(text, reason) rxd { observe({ type: "huh", actor: actor, text: text, reason: reason, ts: now() }); return false; }

verbs.name: command_plan
verbs.source: verb :command_plan(text) rxd { return { ok: true, route: "direct", target: this, verb: "say", args: [text] }; }

verbs.name: command
verbs.source: verb :command(text) rxd { return this:say(text); }

seed_hooks.name: Living Room
seed_hooks.description: A bright, open living room with a rough fireplace, bookcases on two walls, and broad windows looking south. A sliding glass door leads southeast onto a wooden deck.

blocked_exits.south: Surely you don't really want to try walking through the plate-glass windows, especially with a sliding glass door nearby.

seed_hooks.name: Deck
seed_hooks.description: A wooden deck behind the house, facing south across the pool toward the gardens. The living room is west through the glass door, and a large hot tub waits at the east end.

seed_hooks.name: Hot Tub
seed_hooks.description: A molded hot tub with a bench around three sides and bubbling jets running.

seed_hooks.name: Couch
seed_hooks.description: A low couch with worn cushions facing the mantelpiece. It is comfortable enough to sit on, but too large to carry.

seed_hooks.name: Brass Lamp
seed_hooks.description: A small brass lamp with a warm shade. It is light enough to carry from room to room.

seed_hooks.name: Deck Towel
seed_hooks.description: A striped towel folded over the deck rail, dry for now and ready to be taken along.

seed_hooks.name: Mug
seed_hooks.description: A heavy ceramic mug with the last smell of coffee in it.

seed_hooks.name: Cockatoo
seed_hooks.description: A sulphur-crested cockatoo sitting in a cage on top of the mantelpiece. Inside the cage are a few bird-toys, a mirror, and a tray for its food and water.
